## Severity

<!-- Select one and delete the others -->

- **Critical** — Assessment cannot be completed; data loss; report completely broken; security concern
- **High** — Major feature broken; incorrect scores or report sections; print unusable
- **Medium** — Functional issue with workaround; partial UI breakage
- **Low** — Cosmetic issue; minor copy inconsistency; non-blocking console warning

## Notes

<!-- Additional context: URL/environment, localStorage state, whether questionnaire.json or scoring was involved, related issues, etc. -->

**Assessment integrity note:** If this bug relates to scoring, section names, or question content, do **not** fix via unapproved changes to `questionnaire.json` or scoring logic. Tag the issue for governance review per the [Maiyaar Project Constitution](.cursor/rules/maiyaar-project-constitution.mdc).
